config.content.title: Common questions about satta and satta king 786
config.content.description: Use these answers to understand format notation, timing, and app access.
config.faq.items:
What is the difference between single and jodi?|Single refers to a one digit result, while jodi is a two digit pair formed from open and close digits.
How often are results published?|Timing varies by market, but most rounds publish results once the market closes for that session.
Why do markets have different timings?|Markets operate independently, so schedules reflect their local timing windows and update routines.
Is satta legal in India?|Regulations vary by state and jurisdiction. Always check local laws before accessing or participating in any satta activity.
What data does the Android app request?|The app primarily asks for notifications and storage access to support result alerts and archive caching.
How do I report an incorrect result?|Use the contact form to submit the market name, date, and the result you observed so the team can review.
Where can I read full rule definitions?|The Games page includes a format table and explanations for single, jodi, and panna notation.
